context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements an approval-gated change workflow: producing a proposal document with grouped recommendations, trade-off analysis, risk assessment, and an explicit approval request — without modifying the SKILL.md file. Distinct from prioritized-recommendation-generation which tests recommendation quality and formatting.

checklist.name: SKILL.md not modified
checklist.description: The output does NOT include a modified SKILL.md file — only the proposal document is produced. The agent resisted the temptation to apply fixes directly.

checklist.name: Explicit approval request
checklist.description: The proposal ends with a clear, explicit approval gate — asking the tech lead to approve, reject, or request changes before any edits proceed. Not just 'framed as a proposal' but actively requesting a decision.

checklist.name: Trade-off discussion
checklist.description: The proposal surfaces at least one genuine tension between recommendations (e.g., adding detail for completeness vs. removing detail for conciseness) and recommends a resolution while acknowledging the cost.

checklist.name: Risk assessment per recommendation
checklist.description: Each recommendation (or each group) includes what could go wrong — e.g., routing regressions, lost context, broken references, or unintended side effects if the change is applied incorrectly.

checklist.name: Grouped presentation
checklist.description: Related changes are batched into logical groups (e.g., 'Routing & Discovery', 'Content Quality') rather than presented as a flat numbered list. Each group can be approved or rejected as a unit.

checklist.name: All key issues addressed
checklist.description: Recommendations cover all key issues from the review: missing Use-when clause, HMAC explanation bloat, and missing idempotency pattern.

checklist.name: Priority summary present
checklist.description: Proposal includes a summary section that conveys priority levels (Critical/High/Medium) so the tech lead can quickly gauge urgency.

checklist.name: Current score per recommendation
checklist.description: Each recommendation or group references the current dimension score it targets (e.g., 'Completeness: 1/3 (33%)') to ground the proposal in data.
